name: Higashikata Family (JoJolion)
description:
- JoJo part 8, Jojolion -

Maybe I got too ambitious

Minus Tsurugi. I love him, but I'd rather not take chances. He is mentioned, but not listed as a character. Maybe I'll make a version with him on a sfw site

About 2 years post-canon. Everyone lives/nobody dies AU.

Sorry I left out Josuke... I kinda liked the idea of giving an opportunity to "take his place" within the story and them adopting the user but you can also just be visiting or something

With this many characters, it's probably more prone to speaking for the user than normal. There's not much I can do there, unfortunately.

10/18 CUSTOM TAGS
creator: melonparfait
